# Peptides Guide
> The Complete Peptide Encyclopedia — research-backed, no selling, no hype.

## About
Peptides Guide is a comprehensive, free, open-access encyclopedia covering 35+ peptides with mechanisms of action, clinical evidence, dosing protocols, and safety profiles. We do not sell peptides or any products. All claims are supported by published research.

## Content Categories
- Healing & Recovery: BPC-157, TB-500, Thymosin Beta-4, KPV, GHK-Cu
- Body Composition: Tesamorelin, CJC-1295, Ipamorelin, AOD-9604, GHRP-6, GHRP-2, MK-677
- Longevity & Anti-Aging: Epitalon, GHK-Cu, FOXO4-DRI, Humanin, MOTS-c, SS-31
- Cognitive Enhancement: Semax, Selank, Dihexa, PE-22-28, Cerebrolysin
- Sexual Health: PT-141, Kisspeptin-10
- Metabolic: Semaglutide, Tirzepatide, MOTS-c, 5-Amino-1MQ
- Immune & Gut Health: Thymosin Alpha-1, LL-37, Larazotide
- Skin & Hair: GHK-Cu, AHK-Cu, Matrixyl, Argireline
